name: ddl-main-api
description: Implement generateDDL() main entry point and barrel exports
acceptanceCriteria: generateDDL(schema: EnhancedJsonSchema, dialect: SqlDialect) returns DDLOutput per design-ddl-api-surface
Uses utils.topologicalSort() to determine table creation order
DDLOutput.executionOrder contains table names in topologically sorted order
DDLOutput.junctionTables contains all many-to-many junction tables
DDLOutput.foreignKeys contains all FK constraints (for PostgreSQL ALTER TABLE)
Barrel exports: generateDDL, createPostgresDialect, createSqliteDialect, topologicalSort, SqlDialect type, DDLOutput type
JSDoc documentation for main API function
